meta.title: SpaceX Logo Song
meta.description:
I drew the SpaceX logo in Logic Pro X and created a little ring tone out of it! Download it here! - 

https://soundcloud.com/everydayastronaut/sets/spacex-logo-song

Keep up on Instagram @EverydayAstronaut - http://instagram.com/everydayastronaut

And don't forget to subscribe right here on YouTube!
